headline: Uber to acquire Delivery Hero in €13B deal, creating platform spanning 99 countries – EU Information Service

headline: Lilly buys Europe-rooted AtaiBeckley for up to $3.8B - European Biotechnology Magazine

headline: Ecoeridania, Cvc Dif alla firma l’acquisto del big della gestione dei rifiuti - Il Sole 24 ORE
